title: MC-273265 Fix
description: Fixes the "Saving world" pop-up in the pause menu being offest three rows above its proper place
body:
It amazes me how few people are actually bothered by this. It would be fine if it was something niche, but you see this pop-up each time you press ESC, and Mojang just leaving this bug in for the newest major modding version just doesn't sit with me so through blood and sweat I've fixed it myself.


<details>
<summary>How It Looks In 1.21.1</summary>
  
![How It Looks In 1.21.1](https://bugs.mojang.com/api/issue-attachment-get?attachmentId=106249)

</details>

<details>
<summary>How it Should Look (<1.20.6, >1.21.2)</summary>

![How it Should Look (<1.20.6, >1.21.2)](https://bugs.mojang.com/api/issue-attachment-get?attachmentId=106250)

</details>
